summary: W940 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W939 strict-preimage object/map, identity/composition coherence, and source-image normalization leaves into one existing normalized strict-representative lift blueprint. The route projects that blueprint back through existing object-data, map-data, and normalization APIs and delegates through the W937/W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W940 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W940 refines W939 by replacing 18 raw strict-representative lift leaves with one existing normalized lift blueprint, while the blueprint and the rest of the W940 leaves are still not instantiated.

W940 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W940 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, one normalized strict-representative lift blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, one W722 source-triangulation data provider, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the eighteen W940 closed-map target-compact normalized-strict-representative-lift source-triangulation endpoint-strict-exact unit-strict-exact-components explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from actual boundary proposition construction, relation primitive proofs, target-surjectivity proof, target-compactness proof construction, selected-difference primitive proofs, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, normalized-lift blueprint construction, fixed-target uniqueness, W722 source-category triangulation evidence, endpoint strict-exact construction, localized-right-adjoint data, unit mapping-cone component construction, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
